title: Fans Predict August 7 for GTA 6 Trailer 3 Release
summary: Community speculation points to August 7 as the likely date for the third GTA 6 trailer based on Take-Two's earnings call timing. The call is scheduled for 8AM ET before markets open, an unusual timing that fans believe signals major news. Previous Rockstar trailers for GTA 5 and RDR2 dropped two weeks before similar investor calls.

title: Rockstar Developers Consider Strike Action During Crunch Period
summary: Rockstar Games employees are preparing to unionize and potentially strike as GTA 6 enters its final development crunch period. The Independent Workers' Union of Great Britain will represent workers at UK studios on issues including overtime, pay transparency, and flexible working. Any strike action could potentially delay the November 19 launch or affect game quality.

title: GTA 6 Day and Night Cycle Divides Fan Community
summary: Players are debating the implementation of GTA 6's day-night cycle after discovering it operates similarly to Red Dead Redemption 2. Some fans appreciate the realistic approach while others express concerns about how the timing mechanics will affect gameplay. The feature was revealed through recently released screenshots.

title: PlayStation Digital-Only Controversy Outpaces GTA 6 on Social Media
summary: Sony's announcement to phase out physical discs by 2028 has generated more social media discussion than GTA 6 news this week. The controversy connects to GTA 6's digital-only release strategy, which ships as code-in-a-box with no physical disc version. Many fans are concerned about game preservation and digital ownership.

title: GTA Online Independence Day Update Continues Through July
summary: The current GTA Online weekly update runs from July 2-13 with Independence Day themed content and extensive discounts. Players can earn rewards including the Blue Jock Cranley Jumpsuit and bonus cash through various missions. The update bridges the gap before the Next Big Score content arriving later this month.
